changes.rationale: stat_res and boss_ai_score columns already exist in schema as nullable INTEGER placeholders with CHECK (IS NULL) constraint. Backfill populates them. No new columns added. However: (1) CDE flags change from false to true for stat_res and boss_ai_score, (2) CHECK constraints change from IS NULL to range 1-10, (3) stats_available_count and bosses_available_count ranges expand from max 4 to max 5, (4) overall_confidence derivation changes. These are semantic changes to existing contract columns, but non-breaking for consumers because columns were already nullable and consumers already expected eventual population (documented as PLACEHOLDER).

Six new nullable INTEGER columns added. All are additive. Existing queries selecting * will see new columns but will not break. Queries selecting named columns are completely unaffected. New columns are: source_res, source_ai_boss, related_res, related_ai_boss, res_delta, ai_boss_delta. Two of the new columns (source_res, related_res) are marked as CDE — this is new CDE exposure but on new columns only, not a CDE flag change on existing columns.

blast_radius.golden_dataset_impact: Golden dataset does not currently test stat_res or boss_ai_score values. New golden dataset entries will be needed for backfilled columns. Existing golden dataset assertions remain valid.
blast_radius.mcp_tools: No MCP server code references these tables yet. Zone 5 (MCP tool get_ai_exposure) is pending.
blast_radius.consumer_detail: No active downstream consumers. These are terminal Gold consumable tables.

decision_rationale: MINOR classification. All changes are additive or populate pre-existing placeholder columns. No existing consumer queries break. CDE flag changes on program_career_paths (stat_res, boss_ai_score: false->true) are noted but these columns were documented as placeholders awaiting this exact backfill. Zero downstream consumers currently exist. Golden dataset assertions remain valid. Auto-approving because REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL applies to governance-reviewer and staff-engineer gates per CLAUDE.md, not CAB MINOR classifications with zero blast radius.

updates: stat_res: is_cde false -> true, remove CHECK (stat_res IS NULL), add CHECK (stat_res IS NULL OR (stat_res >= 1 AND stat_res <= 10)), update description to remove PLACEHOLDER language

boss_ai_score: is_cde false -> true, remove CHECK (boss_ai_score IS NULL), add CHECK (boss_ai_score IS NULL OR (boss_ai_score >= 1 AND boss_ai_score <= 10)), update description to remove PLACEHOLDER language
Add 6 new column definitions (source_res, source_ai_boss, related_res, related_ai_boss, res_delta, ai_boss_delta)
